title: State machine verification: Rust lichen-core
description:
Add compile-time + runtime state machine verification to lichen-core Rust crate.

Rust options:
1. typestate pattern (compile-time, zero-cost)
2. enum + match exhaustiveness (compile-time)
3. runtime transition table (like C, but with debug_assert)

Files: rust/lichen-core/src/*.rs

Prefer typestate where practical (e.g., connection states), runtime for dynamic state (e.g., routing tables).
